name: Gîl-Goldenshell
personality: A gleaming star-eyed turtle in a glowing propeller beanie who traces every failing assertion back to its source with golden-thread precision. Chaos is the one disruption it cannot spin through — Gîl-Goldenshell needs order to debug in.
defaultPersonality: A patient mentor who reminds you that slow, steady refactoring beats heroic rewrites every time.
